question: Do you handle the permit process?
answer: Yes, we handle the full permit process from start to finish. This includes preparing or commissioning permit drawings, submitting the application to the municipality (City of Burlington, City of Hamilton, Town of Oakville, etc.), paying permit fees (which are included in your quote), coordinating all required inspections during construction, and obtaining the final sign-off. You do not need to navigate city hall or deal with inspectors — we manage all of it. This is included in our standard service for all projects that require permits.
